def negative_lookup_table_derived_from_constants_rebuilt_per_invocation():
    rule_id = "lookup_table_derived_from_constants_rebuilt_per_invocation"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag functions that reconstruct lookup tables from static constants every call."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
